recommendations.title: L'agenzia dei bugiardi
recommendations.overview: Fred works for a company that creates alibis for cheaters until Clio, the daughter of one of his client, falls in love with him.

recommendations.title: Christman in London - God Save the Queen
recommendations.overview: Two brothers go to London to try to score a sensational blow and kidnap the precious dogs of the Queen of England.

recommendations.title: Help! My In-Laws Are Vampires!
recommendations.overview: A loving young couple discover they're expecting a child, but the man isn't too keen on introducing her girlfriend to his family. Is it because he has a vampire father, a witch mother, a ghostly grandma, and a zombie uncle?

recommendations.title: Come tu mi vuoi
recommendations.overview: Giada is a overachieving student who works to pay for college. Riccardo is a spoiled brat who answers her tutoring ad in order to improve his abysmal grades. She's shy and homely. He's handsome and brazen. As they say, opposites attract.

recommendations.title: La Leyenda de los Chaneques
recommendations.overview: Five years after giving up his powers and separating from his friends, Leo San Juan has started a new life trying to focus on his family and their bakery, staying away from danger and adventures. However, Leo knows that his plans are rarely fulfilled

recommendations.title: The Wizards Return: Alex vs. Alex
recommendations.overview: While trying to prove to her family she can be mature and responsible, teen wizard Alex Russo conjures up a spell to rid herself of her bad qualities, unintentionally creating a Good and Evil Alex. When Evil Alex gets involved in a plan to take over

recommendations.title: Tau
recommendations.overview: Held captive in a futuristic smart house, a woman hopes to escape by befriending the A.I. program that controls the house.

recommendations.title: Kiss Me, Stupid

recommendations.title: Yummy
recommendations.overview: A young couple travels to a shabby Eastern European hospital for plastic surgery. The young woman wants a breast reduction. Her mother comes along for yet another face-lift. Wandering through an abandoned ward the boyfriend stumbles upon a young woma

recommendations.title: Still Out of My League
recommendations.overview: After breaking up with her dreamboat, Marta finds love with an artist. But life throws a few twists into the mix for the ailing woman and her friends.
